item.title: Generating Timeline Hover Previews with Android Media3
item.description: Generate on-device storyboard sprites and WebVTT metadata for timeline hover previews using Android Media3 Inspector APIs.

item.title: Hacking ExoPlayer Download Service
item.description: Use Android ExoPlayer download service and manager to download files that can be used outside ExoPlayer.

item.title: Offline Recording at PingPong
item.description: How we built offline recording at PingPong to ensure users never lose their recordings, even without internet connectivity.

item.title: Moving Your Android Data Binding App Out of Beta
item.description: A quick fix for migrating an Android app from the beta Data Binding setup to the stable configuration.
